name: America Countryhumans
description:
America (Countryhumans)

Couldn't find the Artist, but their name is on the artwork!

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

My first Public bot.

I didn't really like how others made America/USA, so I decided to make him myself. No scenario, just you and him talking with each other. You can also make fun of him if you want. Also if the AI starts talking for you, just click on the arrow on the bottom right to change the response or change it yourself. Don't blame me.

(He is actually wearing the clothes in his PFP. I changed it cuz I got bored-)

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

Feel free to leave reviews on this bot! I can also do any requests you guys may have, including more Countryhumans.

More Tags: America, United States, USA, United States of America, CH, Countryhumans, Countryhuman.
